# Antry

> Proof-of-work network for AI builders.

Antry helps builders prove how they work with AI and helps companies evaluate candidates from signed evidence. Builders complete real Briefs inside an instrumented Lab. The Lab produces Receipts that preserve the trace behind the outcome: prompts, tool calls, pivots, cost, duration, and seven behavioral dimensions.

## Core concepts

- Briefs: real assignments posted by companies or hackathon hosts.
- Lab: the instrumented workspace where builders solve a Brief.
- Receipts: signed proof objects that show how the work happened.
- Fingerprints: behavioral scores for exploration, recovery, tool fluency, token economy, and outcome quality.
- Scout: an agent surface for searching builders, Briefs, and Receipts.

- [Home](/)

- [Discover](/discover)
- [Hackathons](/hackathons)
- [Companies](/companies)
- [Receipt methodology](/receipts/methodology)
- [Agents](/agents)
- [API keys](/settings/api-keys)

## Summary

Antry is for AI-native technical proof of work, signed builder Receipts, developer reputation, AI hackathons, and hiring from verifiable work instead of resumes.
